summary: Spawned from MPI-187 live r580-floor crash. Our Pod create sends no allowedCudaVersions -> driver-roulette placement (host driver too old for the image's CUDA build -> ComfyUI boot crash). Thread allowedCudaVersions through _createPodInternal + createPod (REST) + createPodGraphql, mirroring the minMemoryInGb plumbing (MPI-160). Value derived per-card from the image CUDA-floor profile (MPI-70). Immediate guard for cu128 image; HARD PREREQ before any cu130 image ships.
todo -> doing. Picking up allowedCudaVersions driver-floor plumbing. MPI-189 (single cu130) NOT landed yet, so deriving value from resolved image suffix (cu124->12.4, cu128->12.8) per card fallback.

doing -> done. allowedCudaVersions driver-floor guard SHIPPED + LIVE-PROVEN 2026-07-04. Threaded through _createPodInternal (podCudaFloor: cu124->12.4, cu128->12.8, cu130->13.0; derived from image suffix not user input, GPU-only), REST createPod (forwards whole spec), and GraphQL createPodGraphql input (mirrors minMemoryInGb). Live probe: REST has allowedCudaVersions as STRICT ENUM (13.0/12.9/12.8/.../11.8 valid); GraphQL honors it as placement filter (impossible value -> SUPPLY_CONSTRAINT). All 3 floor values enum-valid. HARD PREREQ for cu130 image (MPI-189) now MET. Doc: docs/runpod-remote-engine.md.
Archived completed card during board cleanup.
